app.title: Web Security Analyzer
app.subtitle: Analyze the security of any website in seconds

hsts.title: HSTS (HTTP Strict Transport Security)
hsts.description: Forces the browser to always use HTTPS, preventing downgrade attacks.

csp.title: Content Security Policy
csp.description: Controls which resources the page can load, preventing XSS attacks.
csp.fix: Configure CSP with secure directives without 'unsafe-inline'

xFrame.title: X-Frame-Options
xFrame.description: Prevents your site from being embedded in iframes (clickjacking).

xContentType.title: X-Content-Type-Options
xContentType.description: Prevents the browser from 'guessing' the content type.

referrer.title: Referrer Policy
referrer.description: Controls what information is sent when navigating to other sites.

certificate.title: SSL Certificate
certificate.description: Verifies server identity and encrypts communication.
certificate.fix: Use certificates from trusted providers (Let's Encrypt, etc.)

protocol.title: TLS Protocol
protocol.description: The version of the security protocol being used.
protocol.fix: Configure TLS 1.2 or higher, disable old versions

expiration.title: Certificate Expiration
expiration.description: Time remaining before the certificate becomes invalid.
expiration.fix: Renew the certificate before it expires

cipher.title: Cipher
cipher.fix: Use strong ciphers like AES-256-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305

secure.title: Secure Flag
secure.description: Cookie is only sent over HTTPS connections.
secure.fix: Add Secure attribute to all cookies

httpOnly.title: HttpOnly Flag
httpOnly.description: Cookie is not accessible from JavaScript (protects against XSS).
httpOnly.fix: Add HttpOnly attribute to session cookies

sameSite.title: SameSite Attribute
sameSite.description: Controls whether the cookie is sent in cross-site requests.
sameSite.fix: Use SameSite=Strict or SameSite=Lax for session cookies

thirdParty.title: Third-party Cookies
thirdParty.description: Cookies set by domains different from the page.
thirdParty.fix: Minimize use of third-party cookies or get explicit consent

serverVersion.title: Server Version
serverVersion.description: Exposing server version allows attackers to find known vulnerabilities.
serverVersion.fix: Hide server version in HTTP headers

clickjacking.title: Clickjacking Protection
clickjacking.description: Prevents your site from being embedded in malicious iframes.

xss.title: XSS Protection
xss.fix: Implement CSP, sanitize inputs, use HttpOnly cookies

sqlInjection.title: SQL Injection Protection
sqlInjection.fix: Use parameterized queries, ORMs, validate inputs

dependencies.title: Outdated Dependencies
dependencies.fix: Keep dependencies updated with tools like Dependabot

https.title: HTTPS Enabled
https.description: Site is available through secure connection.
https.fix: Configure SSL/TLS certificates for your domain

redirect.title: HTTP to HTTPS Redirect
redirect.description: Automatically redirects HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
redirect.fix: Configure 301 redirects from HTTP to HTTPS

compression.title: GZIP Compression
compression.description: Reduces response size to improve speed.
compression.fix: Enable gzip/deflate compression on the server

directoryListing.title: Directory Listing
directoryListing.fix: Disable directory listing in server configuration
